channel.title: Krystal Harrow & The Jazz Collective
channel.description: Krystal Harrow is an established vocalist and owner of Krystal Harrow Entertainment, offering premium musical experiences across Jazz, Gospel, R&B, and more.

item.title: The Magic of Caribbean Jazz Fusion
item.dc:creator: Krystal Harrow
item.description: How the steel pan rhythms of Trinidad shaped a distinctly Caribbean approach to jazz improvisation, and what it means to bring that sound to American stages.
item.content:encoded: How the steel pan rhythms of Trinidad shaped a distinctly Caribbean approach to jazz improvisation, and what it means to bring that sound to American stages.

item.title: Vocal Techniques Workshop Recap
item.dc:creator: Krystal Harrow
item.description: Over 40 aspiring vocalists joined Krystal for an intensive two-day vocal techniques and empowerment workshop — here are the key takeaways.
item.content:encoded: Over 40 aspiring vocalists joined Krystal for an intensive two-day vocal techniques and empowerment workshop — here are the key takeaways.

item.title: Behind the Scenes at the Mayor's Building
item.dc:creator: Krystal Harrow
item.description: An exclusive look at the preparation, the sound check, and the electric atmosphere surrounding one of our most celebrated performances at Winston-Salem's Mayor's Building.
item.content:encoded: An exclusive look at the preparation, the sound check, and the electric atmosphere surrounding one of our most celebrated performances at Winston-Salem’s Mayor’s Building.
